description: Style NoteSpun from our irresistibly soft cotton, these are  blissfully cosy T-shirts. These tees from myntra give a fresh twist to an off-duty staple making it ideal for your cool summer wardrobe. Style it with shorts or jeans, understated accessories and lace up casual shoes for perfect man-about-town nonchalanceProduct DetailsPack of three in grey, yellow and whiteRound neck plain knitted t-shirts with short sleeves   Material and Care100% cottonWash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, soak or wringWarm iron on reverseSize and FitRegularThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
